chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-3778 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No. 16482/2024 2. For hearing of main case 07-02-2025 Mr. Ijaz Ahmed Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Khalilullah Jakhro Advocate for the Respondent Sardar Zafar Hussain Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General It is stated that this petition impugns a show cause notice, however, the petitioner shall contest the same before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the matter be adjudicated vide a speaking order after providing an opportunity to the Petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against the Petitioner. Learned counsel for the department articulated no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
